title: tabp decision record
description: Decision and sign-off record written to <project>/.tabp/runs/<run-id>/decision.json. Created when the coordinator presents results for human review (AC-5). sign_off is null until the recruiter explicitly confirms in-chat.

run_id.description: Run identifier this decision record belongs to.

verification_passed.description: Whether the self-verification step passed before presenting results.

verification_notes.description: Free-text notes from the self-verification step.

presented_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when results were presented to the recruiter.

confirmed_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when the recruiter confirmed.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes from the recruiter at sign-off.

sign_off.description: Recruiter sign-off. Null until the recruiter explicitly confirms in-chat.
